# Scheduled Refactoring Audit Request

Use the repository's `refactoring-auditor` custom agent to perform this assessment.

Audit the current default branch and refresh `docs/refactoring-plan.md` with evidence-based refactoring recommendations organized as high, medium, and low priority. Include the required priority matrix, impact/effort view, validation evidence, acceptance checks, and phased roadmap described by the custom agent profile.

This is an assessment-only task. Do not implement refactors, modify application files, alter annual data, update dependencies, or edit generated output. Open a pull request containing only the plan update so it can be reviewed and selected work can be implemented separately.
